cleavage agent: Overnight digestion was carried out with 0.2 µg of trypsin (Trypsin Gold, Promega, Wisconsin, USA)
enrichment method: the collagen polypeptide was enriched using ion-affinity chromatography (His SpinTrap)
instrument: analysis on Orbitrap Elite and Orbitrap XL mass spectrometers
labeling: label-free quantitation of identified Hyp sites
reduction reagent: a final concentration (f.c.) of 50 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
reduction concentration: a final concentration (f.c.) of 50 mM dithiothreitol (DTT, Thermo Fisher Scientific)
